title: My Armenian Phantoms
overview: A tender posthumous letter to Tamara’s father, who was a film actor in Soviet Armenia. She already watched him on TV as a child before later establishing herself as a filmmaker. A captivating sleepwalk through the landscapes of Armenian film history.

trailers.title: BANDA APARTE LARGOS, MY ARMENIAN PHANTOMS
